codeReview.summary: The feature tightens tests for the Z.AI static registry metadata, configured alias model listing/exclusion behavior, and first-class executor registration. The diff aligns with VAL-ZAI-005, VAL-ZAI-006, and VAL-ZAI-012, and existing auth alias tests cover Z.AI alias routing without cross-provider collisions.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill, mission/shared guidance, and commit b63b1af19bc0e7c156aee5a317b03069f6dca5f2. The implementation is test-only, local/credential-safe, follows the go-provider-worker procedure, and satisfies the assigned registry/routing/registration assertions with no blocking or non-blocking issues found.
